issue: rotated DOI side-chrome bbox over-broad in live second-pass review

patch.summary: When a Boilerplate block does not match PyMuPDF text lines through exact whitespace-normalized matching, match it against vertical margin lines with whitespace-insensitive compact text and y-axis overlap, then use the raw vertical line bbox for the extracted candidate.

pre_fix_live_receipt.model_defect: candidate bbox covered the left margin DOI chrome plus main body region instead of only the narrow vertical margin text
